description: Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. is a private equity firm specializing in acquisitions and growth capital investments. The firm primarily provides its services to institutional clients, high net worth individuals, financial institutions, public and private pension plans, sovereign wealth funds, endowments, and foundations. The firm manages separate client-focused public and private fund portfolios, listed partnerships, separate accounts, and co-investments. The firm invests in real assets, including real estate, infrastructure, renewable power, private equity, and credit. The firm employs fund
